openFindings.title: Regression command in the spec omits the required --dataset argument
openFindings.summary: The current harness requires --dataset, while the packet's documented REQ-003/T001/T020 commands omit it. The exact command exits 2; the current-path command with --dataset exits 0.

openFindings.title: REQ-001 verification evidence uses stale line ranges that do not include INTENT_BOOSTERS
openFindings.summary: The proof command scans lines 496-726, but INTENT_BOOSTERS currently starts at line 1154 and PHRASE_INTENT_BOOSTERS at 1418. The invariant is currently true by AST inspection, but the recorded hard-gate evidence is not testing it.

openFindings.title: REQ-010/CHK-032 claims five confidence uplifts even though four measured rows held at +0.00
openFindings.summary: Only the 5-dimension query shows the required +0.10 uplift/correction. The other four representative rows are valid high-confidence holds, but the checked assertion says all five show uplift or NONE-to-match.

openFindings.title: Spec and generated metadata point to a non-existent advisor path
openFindings.summary: The reviewed packet repeatedly names .opencode/skill/skill-advisor/..., which is missing in the current repo. The actual advisor lives under .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/skill-advisor/....

openFindings.title: graph-metadata.json still advertises the completed packet as planned
openFindings.summary: Implementation summary and checklist show completion, but memory graph metadata still derives status=planned, which can misroute resume/search surfaces.

openFindings.title: Rollback instructions recommend git checkout against stale paths
openFindings.summary: Rollback guidance uses git checkout and stale paths. That is risky operational advice in this repo's safety model and likely will not target the actual files after the path move.

openFindings.title: Checklist evidence index references scratch/multi-word-inventory.md, but the artifact is absent
openFindings.summary: The cleanup task allows transient inventory removal, but the checklist still uses that file as evidence for CHK-010.

openFindings.title: decision-record.md is absent from the requested review corpus
evidence: folder listing contains spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, implementation-summary.md, description.json, graph-metadata.json, and scratch files, but no decision-record.md
openFindings.summary: Level 2 does not require a decision record, so this is advisory, but the requested corpus includes it and it does not exist.

openFindings.title: Delta report uses approximate old line references for new PHRASE additions
openFindings.summary: The delta report says to inspect lines ~830-900, but PHRASE entries now live around 1418-1632. This is not behavior-breaking, but slows follow-up verification.

openFindings.title: tasks.md remains entirely unchecked despite implementation-summary/checklist completion
openFindings.summary: Completion state is split: checklist and implementation summary say complete, while task rows remain [ ].
